title: Christmas Ribbon,2.5 Inch x 10 Yards Gold Wired Ribbon,Glitter Snowflake Organza Ribbons for Christmas Tree Decoration, Gift Wrapping,DIY Crafts,Home Wedding Party Decoration
features: Sparkling Appearance: This Christmas ribbon features a shimmering snowflake glitter pattern on a gold organza material,simple and elegant,adding a touch of glamour to your crafts and decorations.

Convenient Size: Measuring 6.3 cm wide and 10 metres/ 10 yards long,our wired ribbon provides ample length for your needs.This ribbon offers an abundance of material for your gifts wrapping ,Christmas trees decor,DIY craft and more.
Quality Material:Christmas tree ribbon is made of good quality polyester, reusable and long-lasting,smooth and not easy to break off.Ideal for Xmas decorations

Perfect Decoration: Christmas ribbon with Shiny shine,the edges have been neatly processed and are inherently firm,the silver ribbon help to retain different shapes such as flowers,butterflies and bows.The stylish design will make your home look more beautiful and impress your friends or family.

Widely Used: Christmas ribbon suitable for a variety of crafts and decorations such as Christmas trees,card making,gift packaging,party favors,hair bows,sewing,packaging design,floral projects and so on. It's a wonderful decoration for Christmas,Halloween,Birthday,wedding,party,Valentines Day,etc.
